data.body: Fourth review BLOCK remediation: accepted fc9c130d2875d37bc by correcting schema state: precheck output remains closed, decide input remains intentionally open, and both declare/require review_phase atomically. Golden tests assert those distinct additionalProperties postures plus version-coherent rollback. Also accepted the rollback advisory by requiring compact to pause for a lossless downgrade window while retaining the documented bootstrap recovery if operators do not pause it. Rerunning before downstream review.
